notes: Initial canonical registry seeded from HY-IG v2 reference pair (per META-RPD) after Wave-5 reproducibility-audit Axis 1 exposed that recurring expander concepts (Plain English / ELI5 / In plain English / What this means) used divergent titles. Five bootstrap entries cover every recurring expander concept in the HY-IG v2 portal. Any new recurring concept is added via PR; ad-hoc deviations require a regression_note entry per APP-EX1.

plain_english.when_to_use: Layperson-friendly explanation of a technical construct (model, method, metric). N8 Plain English expanders on every page. Must NOT be rendered as 'ELI5', 'In plain English', 'What this means', or emoji-prefixed variants.

deeper_dive.when_to_use: Technical detail for quant readers — formulas, citations, parameter choices, references. Used for progressive disclosure per APP-AF1 on Evidence and Methodology pages.

method_rationale.when_to_use: Element 3 of the Evidence 8-element template (RES-EP1). One expander per method block explaining the identification strategy, why this method over alternatives, and what question it answers.

chart_reading_guide.when_to_use: Chart-reading guide for complex visualizations — axis convention, color encoding, threshold lines. Paired with 'How to read it:' caption prefix (APP-CC1). Used for Story-page hero chart, history-zoom charts, and any Evidence chart with non-obvious encoding.

honest_caveat.when_to_use: Element 7 of the Evidence 8-element template (RES-EP1). Caveats about sample size, OOS window, regime coverage, model assumptions. Paired with 'Caveat:' caption prefix (APP-CC1).
